class.name: Face
class.description: [Face] represents an OCCT face and supports wire-based or polygonal construction. It exposes planarity checks, outer-wire access, and a representative normal sampled from the face UV domain.

method.name: build_from_wire
method.description: Builds a face from [param wire]. When [param only_plane] is [code]true[/code], OCCT is restricted to planar face construction.

method.name: build_from_wires
method.description: Builds a face from [param outer_wire] and any number of inner boundary wires in [param inner_wires]. Inner wires become holes in the resulting face.

method.name: build_polygon
method.description: Builds a closed polygonal face through [param points].

method.name: offset_2d
method.description: Builds a planar 2D offset of this face by [param distance]. The outer boundary is offset by [param distance] and hole boundaries are offset by the opposite amount.

method.name: extruded
method.description: Builds a prism solid by extruding the face along [param direction].

method.name: revolved
method.description: Builds a solid by revolving the face around [param axis]. The default angle performs a full revolution.

method.name: is_planar
method.description: Returns whether the supporting surface of the face is planar.

method.name: get_outer_wire
method.description: Returns the outer boundary wire of the face.

method.name: get_inner_wires
method.description: Returns the inner boundary wires of the face. These wires represent holes cut out of the outer boundary.

method.name: get_normal
method.description: Returns a representative face normal sampled near the center of the face UV bounds.
